TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tommy_Remengesau, title = Tommy_Remengesau, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tommy_Remengesau} }

S.FORM: Tommy Remengesau ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 2, Tommy Remengesau, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Palau ta' misuw hya' ga Tommy Remengesau, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Tommy Remengesau ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 2, Tommy Remengesau, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Palau ta' misuw hya' ga Tommy Remengesau, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: tommj remeŋes~ɕau rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, tommj remeŋes~ɕau, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw palau taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa tommj remeŋes~ɕau, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
